title: stelis beckii
intro: Stelis beckii, also known as the "Hairy Orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis beckii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Stelis beckii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
